## ERT1.2. En route capacity incentive scheme

The Slovenian NSA reports a financial bonus for the ANSP because of the 2025 performance. The local incentive target for en route ATFM delays, due to CRSTMP causes only, was set at 0.06 mins/flight, (with a deadband of +/-0.01mins).

The NSA reports an achieved CRSTMP performance of 0.03 mins/flight but does not report how this value was verified.

**[The value of the bonus needs to be confirmed.]{.mark}**

\[NB The attribution of original delay causes on the ansperformance.eu dashboard is unverified\]
